calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mary Sancimino appearing via zoom for Patricia Walsh (Petitioner).

Discussion was held in regard to the manner the property was being held, whether it was joint tenancy or community property. Spousal property petition is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Choi: Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and An Order to show cause will be issued to Mary Giselle Sancimino (attorney) to appear on July 19, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. Petition for spousal property is continued to July 19, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.

The Court received a call from Mrs. Sancimino indicating that she was on the phone but was unable to get connected. The order to appear/order to show cause will not be issue. The Petition for spousal property is continued to June 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.
